heading: Allotments or holdings outside of reservations
label: 5111 Allotments or holdings outside of reservations
text: Nothing contained in this Act shall be construed to relate to Indian holdings of allotments or homesteads upon the public domain outside of the geographic boundaries of any Indian reservation now existing or established hereafter.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the Indian Reorganization Act, which is classified generally to this chapter.
